coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 70%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/5. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 110% for 5:36. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 5 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/5. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 110% for 5:36. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-100 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:36 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/5. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 55-55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 52% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 110% for 5:36. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 5min at 55%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 52% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 52% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. 110% for 5:36. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 43 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4 of 5. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 5/5.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 110-110% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 17 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 5:36 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 110-110% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
